/CAL DISPOSITION/NP/X DEFENDANT'S WAIVER AND PLEA IN ABSENTIA FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
